premise: I ran my dad's roofing company for 12 years while my brother partied. At the retirement dinner, dad handed my brother the company in front of 40 guests. I quit that night, joined our biggest client, and watched the firm collapse in 18 months.

thumb.label: Thumbnail + metadata
thumb.detail: My Dad Gave My Brother The Company After 12 Years. So I Walked Away And Watched
